positive: A symmetrical, highly detailed celestial forest silhouette. Geometric mountain ranges and stylized flora are illuminated by bioluminescent constellations and crescent moons. The design features a rich palette of deep indigo, midnight blue, and teal, dramatically contrasted with vibrant glowing gold and electric neon accents. Clean vector illustration style, symmetrical composition, mystical geometric patterns woven throughout the foliage, centered design, high contrast, suitable for apparel print, intricate etching style.
